text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's the day of the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her resolve to keep up with Mihono Bourbon
hardened, Rice Shower enters the starting gate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then... over the many voices in the crowd, the
signal sounds, marking the beginning of the
Kikuka Sho.
